transcript:
Agent: Hi, this is Cadence calling on behalf of Pearl Dental Group, NPI 1827364582, for an eligibility verification. Tax ID 92-7281930. Your rep ID please?
Rep: Hi, this is Tom, rep ID TM4429, MetLife Dental.
Agent: Thanks Tom. Verifying for member Daniel Foster, member ID MET8273645, date of birth October 22 1978, group number 4493827.
Rep: One moment. Okay, I have the member record. Coverage for Daniel Foster terminated on December 31 2025. Member is no longer eligible for benefits as of January 1 2026.
Agent: Was the termination due to non-payment, employment change, or other reason?
Rep: Termination reason on file is loss of employment, COBRA was not elected. The member was offered continuation coverage but declined.
Agent: Was there any active coverage transitioned elsewhere?
Rep: No, we have no record of replacement coverage on our end.
Agent: Thank you Tom.
Rep: Sure, have a good day.

expectedExtraction.terminationReason: loss of employment, COBRA not elected
